task: COVERAGE-MEASUREMENT Part 1, Deliverable A — GLEIF Level-2 who-owns-whom -> issuer_lei -> ultimate-parent -> parent legal jurisdiction (ISO country)
scope_disclaimer: This contract grounds a free per-security ultimate-parent-nationality LOOKUP. It does NOT compute coverage, does NOT re-tag any holding, and does NOT modify the panel. Coverage is Part 2 (a separate agent).

path_used.relationships_level2_RR: BULK golden-copy file (downloaded + parsed). The full RR golden copy is small enough to fetch whole.
path_used.parent_and_issuer_country_level1: FREE GLEIF API (api.gleif.org/api/v1/lei-records), NOT the bulk L1 golden copy.
path_used.why_api_for_country: The full Level-1 lei2 golden copy is ~468 MB zip / 3,356,603 records (large). Only the distinct LEIs actually needed (240 distinct parent LEIs + 3,434 distinct haven issuer LEIs = 3,599 distinct) were resolved, in 200-LEI batches via the API filter[lei] parameter. This is the documented tractable path; the RR relationships still came from the REAL bulk file as required.

publish_listing_api.note: Authoritative listing of the latest golden-copy bulk downloads. Queried live on 2026-06-29.

level1_lei2_golden_copy_NOT_downloaded.reason_skipped: Large; replaced by targeted GLEIF API calls for only the needed LEIs (see path_used).

confirmed_field_names.field_confirmation_method: Read from the ACTUAL fetched RR CSV header/rows and an ACTUAL GLEIF API record, not asserted from memory.

RR_record_real.note: A real haven issuer LEI (1IE8VN30JCEQV1H4R804) ultimately consolidated by MLU0ZO3ML4LN2LL2TL39.

L1_API_record_real.data.attributes.entity.legalName.name: HSBC HOLDINGS PLC
L1_API_record_real.note: Confirms the parent-country field name and ISO2 form. So the example child 1IE8VN30JCEQV1H4R804 -> parent HSBC HOLDINGS PLC -> parent_country_iso = GB.

residence_vs_nationality_validation.entity.legalName.name: Tencent Holdings Ltd (per record, CJK form returned)
residence_vs_nationality_validation.note: Tencent's OWN LEI legal country is KY (Cayman residence). This shows why the issuer's own country is NOT nationality; only the parent chain (or, for H-shares, GLEIF's legal jurisdiction itself = CN) yields China nationality.

addressable_universe.haven_rows_with_blank_lei_placeholder: 215260 rows carry issuer_lei == 'N/A' (3-char placeholder); these are NOT GLEIF-addressable.
addressable_universe.distinct_non_null_haven_issuer_leis_note: 20-char valid LEIs only; this is the GLEIF-addressable universe.

resolution_result.haven_leis_unresolved_reason: GLEIF API returned no record for these 7 LEIs (likely retired/merged/lapsed LEIs not in the active filter result).

by_relationship_type.note: 344 haven issuer LEIs have a REAL RR parent relationship (323 IS_ULTIMATELY_CONSOLIDATED_BY + 21 IS_DIRECTLY_CONSOLIDATED_BY). The remaining 3083 have NO RR parent filed in GLEIF and were marked SELF (issuer's own legal country, ultimate_parent_lei==issuer_lei).

resolution_result.RR_relationship_coverage_caveat: Only 344 of 3434 haven issuer LEIs (10.0%) carry ANY parent consolidation relationship in GLEIF. GLEIF Level-2 reporting is sparse — most entities never file a parent. So a NATIONALITY claim FROM A REAL PARENT RELATIONSHIP exists for only ~10% of the addressable universe; the rest fall back to the issuer's own legal jurisdiction (SELF), which is NOT ultimate-parent nationality except where GLEIF's own legal jurisdiction already differs from N-PORT residence (notably HK-listed H-shares with legal jurisdiction CN).

cn_parent_count.cn_from_real_parent_relationship_note: 112 haven issuer LEIs (106 ULTIMATE + 6 DIRECT) have an ACTUAL GLEIF parent whose legal country is CN. This is the defensible RR-grounded China-nationality signal.
cn_parent_count.cn_from_SELF_own_legal_jurisdiction_note: 193 haven-resident (mostly HKG) issuers have NO RR parent but GLEIF records their OWN legal jurisdiction as CN — verified examples: Air China, Datang International Power, Angang Steel, Sinopec, China Molybdenum, Zhejiang Expressway (all N-PORT residence HKG, GLEIF legalAddress.country CN). These are H-share companies; CN here is the entity's own legal jurisdiction, captured as nationality only because GLEIF's legal country differs from N-PORT residence.

artifacts_written.lei_parent_country_csv: build/data/gleif/lei_parent_country.csv (3427 rows; columns issuer_lei, ultimate_parent_lei, parent_country_iso, relationship_type, source)
artifacts_written.gitignore_entry: build/data/.gitignore (RR bulk URL recorded for reproducibility)

confidence_reason: All structural facts (RR field names, consolidation relationship types and their counts, the L1 legal-country field) were read from the ACTUAL fetched RR golden-copy CSV and ACTUAL GLEIF API records, with real example records quoted. The addressable universe (3434) and resolution counts (3427 resolved; 305 CN, of which 112 from a real parent relationship) are computed directly from the panel and the fetched data, not asserted. The one DOWNGRADE caveat documented in-line: GLEIF Level-2 parent reporting is sparse (only 344/3434 = 10% carry any RR parent), so the from-real-parent China signal covers only ~10% of the universe; the SELF fallback is the issuer's own legal jurisdiction, not ultimate parent. This caveat is recorded, not smoothed over.
known_frictions: GLEIF Level-2 RR parent reporting is sparse: only 344 of 3434 haven issuer LEIs (10%) have ANY consolidation parent. The dominant fallback is SELF (own legal jurisdiction), which is residence-like, not nationality.
7 haven issuer LEIs could not be resolved to any country via the GLEIF API (likely lapsed/merged).

215,260 haven rows carry issuer_lei == 'N/A' (no LEI at all) and are entirely outside the GLEIF-addressable universe; those holdings need an identifier-based map (ISIN/CUSIP), not GLEIF — handled by Deliverable B.

SELF-CN rows (193) reflect GLEIF's legal jurisdiction (CN) for H-share issuers whose N-PORT residence is HKG; this is a genuine nationality signal but arises from the entity's own legal jurisdiction, not a parent relationship — flagged via relationship_type=SELF so Part 2 can treat it distinctly.
SOURCE: GLEIF golden-copy publish listing https://goldencopy.gleif.org/api/v2/golden-copies/publishes/latest and RR golden-copy bulk file https://goldencopy.gleif.org/storage/golden-copy-files/2026/06/29/1245215/20260629-1600-gleif-goldencopy-rr-golden-copy.csv.zip (RR_2.1, publish 2026-06-29 16:00 UTC, 477383 records), with parent/issuer legal country from the free GLEIF API https://api.gleif.org/api/v1/lei-records (field data.attributes.entity.legalAddress.country). All fetched and read on 2026-06-29.
